description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push and pull request events. Set up a matrix job on ubuntu-20.04 to test SQLAlchemy 1.4.x versions across multiple Python and ClickHouse versions, and SA versions from 0 to 44. The job should check out the code, set up Python, install test requirements and SQLAlchemy, configure the test environment, start a ClickHouse server container, and run tests with a 2-minute timeout.
